title: Amazon pays me royalties every month forever #amazonkdp
spoken_script: Amazon KDP lets you publish books with zero money upfront. Low content books. Journals. Planners. Puzzle books. You create them once with free AI tools. Upload to KDP. Amazon prints and ships every order. You collect royalties. A single puzzle book can earn 20 to 200 dollars a month. I have 10 running right now on complete autopilot. Full guide at link in bio. Free to start.
